completed_tasks.name: Implement hermes_core.py with llama.cpp integration and RAG
Implement auto-skills SQLite tables, manager, and generator
Develop and build llama.cpp for gemma4

blockers.description: Systematic segmentation faults in llama.cpp (both manual build CUDA and Homebrew Vulkan) during 'load_tensors'.
blockers.workaround: Possible system reboot or strictly audited CUDA build verification.

human_actions_pending.action: Run 'llama-server' in testing mode or reboot computer to clear driver state.
human_actions_pending.context: Both CUDA and Vulkan environments crashed right at tensor loading, suggesting potential kernel/driver invalid states (ERR showed in nvidia-smi earlier).

decisions.decision: Abandoned Gemma-4 in favor of Qwen 3.6 fallback
decisions.rationale: Both failed identically, ruling out model corruption and pointing squarely at inference engine build/driver bugs.

next_action: Investigate specific backtrace of the segfault or perform a clean reboot to reset GPU kernel states, then launch using Qwen.
context_notes: Phase 4 logic is 100% code-complete. We successfully updated llama.cpp to 9100 (supporting gemma4) and downloaded Qwen 3.6 (16GB rescue finished). However, both models now Segfault at Vulkan device fence destruction. Driver is likely in corrupted state.
